title: Endless Flowers
description: Grow endless flowers with just a touch of bone meal and create gardens anywhere!
body:
# ✨ New Mod: Endless Flowers 🌸

Tired of hunting across the world for rare flowers? Not anymore!
With our mod, flowers can now multiply right where they grow:

- 🌼 Just grab some bone meal
- 🌱 Right-click on a flower
- 🌸 And watch new flowers appear nearby!

Now creating beautiful gardens and farming rare dyes is easier than ever.
No more flower hunting — grow them yourself!
